2605.06592.title: DINORANKCLIP: DINOv3 Distillation and Injection for Vision-Language Pretraining with High-Order Ranking Consistency
2605.06592.paper_summary: Contrastive language-image pretraining (CLIP) suffers from two structural weaknesses: the symmetric InfoNCE loss discards the relative ordering among unmatched in-batch pairs, and global pooling collapses the visual representation into a semantic bottleneck that is poorly sensitive to fine-grained local structure. RANKCLIP partially addresses the first issue with a list-wise Plackett-Luce ranking-consistency loss, but its model is strictly first-order and inherits the second weakness untouched. We propose DINORANKCLIP, a pretraining framework that addresses both jointly. Our principal contribution is injecting a frozen DINOv3 teacher into the contrastive trunk through a dual-branch lightweight student and a multi-scale fusion module with channel-spatial attention, a self-attention refiner, and a conflict-aware gate that preserves the cross-modal alignment up to first order. Complementarily, we introduce a high-order Plackett-Luce ranking model in which the per-position utility is augmented with attention-parameterised pairwise and tuple-wise transition terms; the family contains CLIP and RANKCLIP as nested zero-order and first-order special cases, and the optimal order on every benchmark is $R^*=3$. The full empirical study -- order sweep, Fine-grained Probe on five datasets, four-node Modality-Gap analysis, six-variant Fusion ablation -- fits in 72 hours on a single eight-GPU H100 node and trains entirely on Conceptual Captions 3M. DINORANKCLIP consistently outperforms CLIP, CyCLIP, ALIP, and RANKCLIP under matched compute, with the largest relative gains on the fine-grained and out-of-distribution evaluations that most directly stress local structural reasoning.
2605.06592.paper_summary_zh: 對比語言-圖像預訓練（CLIP）存在兩個結構性弱點：對稱的InfoNCE損失丟棄了未匹配批次對之間的相對順序，並且全局池化將視覺表示壓縮成一個對細粒度局部結構敏感性差的語義瓶頸。RANKCLIP部分解決了第一個問題，使用了一種基於列表的Plackett-Luce排名一致性損失，但其模型嚴格為一階，並且未觸及第二個弱點。我們提出了DINORANKCLIP，一個同時解決這兩個問題的預訓練框架。我們的主要貢獻是通過一個雙分支輕量級學生和一個具有通道-空間注意力的多尺度融合模塊，將一個凍結的DINOv3教師注入對比主幹，還有一個自注意力精煉器和一個保留跨模態對齊的衝突感知閘，該對齊保持到一階。作為補充，我們引入了一個高階Plackett-Luce排名模型，其中每個位置的效用通過注意力參數化的成對和元組過渡項進行增強；該家族包含CLIP和RANKCLIP作為嵌套的零階和一階特例，並且在每個基準上的最佳順序為$R^*=3$。完整的實證研究——順序掃描、在五個數據集上的細粒度探測、四節點模態差距分析、六變體融合消融——在單個八GPU H100節點上適合72小時，並完全在Conceptual Captions 3M上訓練。DINORANKCLIP在匹配計算下始終優於CLIP、CyCLIP、ALIP和RANKCLIP，在細粒度和分佈外評估中獲得最大的相對增益，這些評估最直接地強調了局部結構推理。
2605.06592.author: Shuyang Jiang et.al.
2605.06592.authors: Shuyang Jiang, Nan Yu, Yiming Zhang, Zenghui Ding, Zhenyu Wu
